videos.headline: Tennessee Volunteers vs. Alabama Crimson Tide: Full Highlights
videos.description: Tennessee Volunteers vs. Alabama Crimson Tide: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee Volunteers vs. Alabama Crimson Tide: Full Highlights) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: No. 6 Alabama defeats No. 11 Tennessee, stays on hot streak
videos.description: QB Ty Simpson throws for 253 yards with two touchdowns while Zabian Brown scores on a 99-yard pick-six to lead the Crimson Tide to their sixth straight win, 37-20, over the Vols.

videos.headline: Joey Aguilar dart to Braylon Staley ties it for Tennessee
videos.description: Joey Aguilar slips a 2-yard touchdown pass to Braylon Staley to knot the score at 7-7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Joey Aguilar dart to Braylon Staley ties it for Tennessee) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ty Simpson slings a TD pass to Isaiah Horton for Alabama
videos.description: Ty Simpson's short touchdown pass to Isaiah Horton gives Alabama a 7-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ty Simpson slings a TD pass to Isaiah Horton for Alabama) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jam Miller walks into the end zone untouched for Alabama
videos.description: Jam Miller rushes in for a 1-yard touchdown for Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jam Miller walks into the end zone untouched for Alabama) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Pick-six! Zabien Brown takes it 99 yards to the house for Alabama
videos.description: Zabien Brown intercepts Joey Aguilar in the red zone and returns it 99 yards for an Alabama touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Pick-six! Zabien Brown takes it 99 yards to the house for Alabama) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee gets a much-needed TD from DeSean Bishop
videos.description: DeSean Bishop rushes 44 yards for a Tennessee touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee gets a much-needed TD from DeSean Bishop) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama extends lead with Ty Simpson TD
videos.description: Ty Simpson hits Rico Scott for an 11-yard touchdown for Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama extends lead with Ty Simpson TD) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: DeSean Bishop scores 2nd straight TD
videos.description: DeSean Bishop rushes 1 yard for his second consecutive Tennessee touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DeSean Bishop scores 2nd straight TD) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama breaks game wide open with Daniel Hill TD
videos.description: Daniel Hill takes in a 4-yard rushing touchdown to put Alabama up 37-20 late.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama breaks game wide open with Daniel Hill TD) 2025/10/18 ESHEET
